title: pyrethrum oltense
intro: Pyrethrum oltense, also known as Pyrethrum or Pyrethrum daisy, is a flowering plant native to Europe, known for its bright yellow and white blooms. The medicinal properties of Pyrethrum oltense come from its leaves and flowers, which contain a compound called pyrethrin, a natural insecticide used to repel mosquitoes and other pests. The health benefits of Pyrethrum oltense include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Pyrethrum oltense include teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to treat colds, coughs, and other respiratory issues, as well as to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
